hero.title: MaxTube
hero.subtitle: YouTube. Supercharged. No Limits.
hero.description: Download MaxTube APK – The ultimate enhanced YouTube experience with background play, ad-free streaming, 4K downloads, and exclusive premium features.

items.title: 100% Ad-Free
items.description: Watch any YouTube video without a single ad interruption. Pure, uninterrupted viewing.

items.title: Background Play
items.description: Keep videos and music playing while using other apps or even when the screen is off.

items.title: 4K Video Downloads
items.description: Download any video in up to 4K quality directly to your device. No limits.

items.title: Blazing Fast
items.description: Optimized engine for lightning-fast buffering and seamless 4K / 8K streaming.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: No tracking, no data collection. Watch what you want with complete privacy.

items.title: Custom Themes
items.description: Dark mode, AMOLED black, custom accent colors – personalize MaxTube your way.

items.question: What is MaxTube?
items.answer: MaxTube is an enhanced YouTube client for Android that unlocks features like ad-free playback, background audio, 4K downloads, and custom themes – all for free.

items.question: Is MaxTube safe to use?
items.answer: Yes. MaxTube APK is scanned and verified before every release. It is safe to install. As with any third-party app, use it at your own discretion.

items.question: Will my account get banned?
items.answer: MaxTube uses advanced measures to keep your account safe. We recommend using a secondary Google account for maximum safety.

items.question: How do I install MaxTube?
items.answer: Download the APK, go to Settings → Security → enable 'Install from Unknown Sources', then open the downloaded APK and tap Install. Done!

items.question: Does MaxTube support YouTube Music?
items.answer: Yes! MaxTube includes a built-in music player with background playback so you can enjoy YouTube Music without a Premium subscription.

footer.disclaimer: MaxTube is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Google LLC or YouTube. YouTube™ is a trademark of Google LLC.
